== Notes for [[Item:Q116195|Q116195]] ==

'''doña María Sánchez de Navarre'''

== Sources ==

[http://fmg.ac/Projects/MedLands/VIZCAYA.htm#InigoLopezdied1077 FMG MedLands Vizcaya]

"Europaische Stammtafeln", Isenburg.
"Plantagenet Ancestry", Turton.[Custer February 1, 2002 Family Tree.FTW]

[merge G675.FTW]

"Europaische Stammtafeln", Isenburg.
"Plantagenet Ancestry", Turton.

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
